feedback.text: An important issue that is happening in the video industry today is that many video game titles are designed to be dependent on a remote server to play. When these servers are eventually shut down the games are rendered unplayable, with no consideration for the content of the game or consumer feedback. From my perspective, it would be of the public interest to resist this business practice so that more video games can be preserved in the future. I think this initiative is a good opportunity to address this issue as well.
